steps.title: Convert the table values
steps.content:
The table gives values of $y=f(x)+4$, but the question asks about $y=f(x)$. Subtract $4$ from each listed $y$-value.
$$f(18)=-6-4=-10$$
$$f(20)=10-4=6$$
$$f(22)=-6-4=-10$$

steps.title: Write vertex form
steps.content:
Because $f(18)$ and $f(22)$ are equal, the axis of symmetry is halfway between $18$ and $22$, at $x=20$. The vertex is $(20,6)$, so
$$f(x)=a(x-20)^2+6$$
